queue.task: Session B kickoff: Review Session A's 29 bugs + 97% pass rate. Assess what's most impactful for depth work: CTEs through Volcano, correlated subqueries, window functions, or extraction.
queue.summary: Reviewed Session A: 29 bugs, 97%+ pass rate. Priority: CTEs through Volcano (14x speedup, high ROI), then correlated subqueries, then window functions. Queue aligned.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Route CTEs through Volcano for 14x speedup (5ms vs 70ms)
queue.summary: CTEs already route through Volcano planner (lines 28-56). Found real bug: CTE alias qualification broken (rs.region→undefined). Plan: fix alias bug + add tests.

queue.task: Fix CTE alias qualification bug: rs.region returns undefined when CTE aliased as rs
queue.summary: Fixed CTE alias qualification bug. CTE inner JOINs produced qualified names (c.region) that became double-qualified (rs.c.region) in outer query. Strip qualifiers during CTE materialization. 66 CTE tests + 85 SQL tests pass.

queue.task: Add comprehensive CTE-Volcano correctness tests (CTE aliasing, multi-CTE, nested CTE)
queue.summary: Added 11 CTE-Volcano integration tests: alias qualification, multi-CTE, JOINs inside CTEs, 3-way JOINs, parity checks. All pass.

queue.task: Git push, dashboard update, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed workspace+henrydb. Dashboard online and regenerated. CTE fix knowledge captured.

queue.task: Reflect on CTE work. Check remaining Volcano gaps. Decide next: window functions or correlated subqueries?
queue.summary: Correlated EXISTS/IN already work in Volcano. Real gap: scalar correlated subqueries in SELECT return null (Volcano), work in legacy. Also: func-wrapped aggregates (COALESCE(SUM(x),0)) fall back to legacy. Priority: (1) func-wrapped aggregates (quick win), (2) scalar correlated subqueries in SELECT.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Add correlated subquery support to Volcano planner
queue.summary: Two features: (1) func-wrapped aggregates: detect nested function(aggregate) in planner, extract inner agg, apply outer func in Project. (2) scalar correlated subqueries: buildValueGetter detect subquery type, execute sub-plan per outer row. 2 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Support function-wrapped aggregates in Volcano (COALESCE(SUM(x),0), NULLIF(AVG(x),0), etc.)
queue.summary: Function-wrapped aggregates now supported in Volcano. COALESCE(SUM), NULLIF(COUNT), ROUND(AVG), ABS(SUM) all work. Guard removed. 115/115 tests pass.

queue.task: Support scalar correlated subqueries in Volcano SELECT columns
queue.summary: Scalar correlated subqueries now work in Volcano SELECT columns. Uses buildCorrelatedSubqueryPlan per outer row. Results match legacy exactly. 115/115 tests pass.

queue.task: Git push, dashboard update
queue.summary: Git pushed henrydb + workspace. Dashboard synced.

queue.task: Mid-session quality check. Depth check: am I learning? Assess remaining time and priorities.
queue.summary: Depth check passed: CTE alias bug was surprising, func-wrapped agg fallback was educational. 4 BUILDs so far, good learning rate. Revised plan: drop window functions (too complex), add derived tables in FROM (common, achievable). 5.75h remaining.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Support derived tables (subqueries) in FROM clause in Volcano
queue.summary: Plan: materialize FROM subquery via Volcano plan, create virtual table with schema from result columns, add to tables map under alias. Same pattern as CTE materialization. 2 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Support derived tables in Volcano FROM: materialize subquery, create virtual table, wire into scan
queue.summary: Derived tables in FROM now supported in Volcano. Materialize subquery, create virtual table, wire into scan. 107/107 tests pass.

queue.task: Add tests for derived tables: FROM subquery, JOIN with subquery, nested derived tables
queue.summary: 10 derived table tests: basic, alias qualification, WHERE, JOIN, GROUP BY, legacy parity, nested derived, COALESCE, scalar subquery. All pass.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Window function support in Volcano iterators

queue.task: Git push, test sweep, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed. Targeted test sweep: 157/157 tests pass across sql, volcano, CTE, join, explain, derived-table, subquery, aggregate, tpch. No regressions.

queue.task: Research: what are the remaining ~3% failures? Categorize and triage.
queue.summary: Categorized remaining failures: 8 LATERAL JOIN (pre-existing, partial impl), 8 JSON (pre-existing), 4 FTS (pre-existing). Fixed derived-table-with-window-function regression. Core SQL: 157/157 pass.

queue.task: Direction: fix LATERAL JOIN failures (8), then assess what other Volcano gaps to close. Check BUILD count (depth gate).
queue.summary: Major insight: LATERAL failures (8/8) caused by Volcano not understanding outer row context. Fixed with Volcano skip guard. Also found correlated WHERE subquery (SELECT AVG...) is pre-existing failure. 398/403 broad test pass.

queue.goal: Fix LATERAL JOIN: top-N per group, LEFT LATERAL, LATERAL with aggregation

queue.task: Git push, test sweep, learning capture
queue.summary: Git pushed. Knowledge captured in volcano-gaps.md. 398/403 broad tests pass. Key insight documented: Volcano steal problem pattern.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Aggregate FILTER clause support (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE x > 0))
queue.summary: Plan: add filter predicate to aggregate spec in volcano-planner, pass to HashAggregate. In open() loop, only push values when filter matches. Remove _tryVolcanoSelect guard.

queue.task: Add FILTER clause to HashAggregate + volcano-planner aggregate collection
queue.summary: Aggregate FILTER clause now works in Volcano. COUNT/SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX with FILTER, mixed filtered/unfiltered. 106/106 tests pass.

queue.task: Test FILTER clause: COUNT FILTER, SUM FILTER, mixed filtered/unfiltered aggregates
queue.summary: 10 aggregate FILTER tests: COUNT/SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX FILTER, GROUP BY, complex conditions, parity. All pass.

queue.task: Afternoon depth check. 10 BUILDs done? Assess quality and direction.
queue.summary: 8 BUILDs, good depth: 3 surprises, 4+ lessons, 3 bugs found. Direction: fix correlated WHERE subquery (T30), then stress test (T29), then JOIN subqueries if time.

queue.task: Investigate correlated WHERE subquery failure: SELECT ... WHERE col > (SELECT AVG(...) WHERE correlated). Pre-existing, returns empty in Volcano.
queue.summary: Fixed correlated WHERE subqueries in Volcano. buildValueGetter now handles SUBQUERY type: correlated evals per row via buildCorrelatedSubqueryPlan, non-correlated evaluates eagerly. 168/168 tests pass, fixes subquery-stress failure.

queue.goal: HenryDB: JOIN subqueries in JOIN ON clause for Volcano
queue.summary: JOIN subqueries already work in Volcano (materialized at planner lines 154-184). No changes needed. Verified with test.
Skipped — JOIN subqueries already handled.

queue.task: Git push, broader test sweep
queue.summary: Git pushed. Broader sweep: 331/354 (up from 306/337). LATERAL 18/18, subquery-stress fixed. Remaining 23 failures all pre-existing FTS/JSON gaps.

queue.task: Stress-test all new Volcano features: adversarial queries mixing CTEs, derived tables, correlated subqueries, func-wrapped aggregates
queue.summary: Stress-tested 6 adversarial queries mixing CTEs+derived+correlated+FILTER. Found and fixed ctx propagation bug in buildValueGetter (COALESCE+scalar subquery). 5/6 adversarial pass, 1 edge case (triple-nested correlation) out of scope. 168/168 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: what Volcano gaps remain? Prioritize for impact. Check DISTINCT aggregate, SELECT without FROM, JSON fixes.
queue.summary: 9 BUILDs so far, good depth. Quick wins: SELECT without FROM, DISTINCT aggregates. Then CTEs with UNION. Queue set for 5 more hours.

queue.task: Support SELECT without FROM in Volcano (SELECT 1+1, SELECT NOW())
queue.summary: SELECT without FROM now works in Volcano. Virtual single-row iterator. 85/85 tests pass.

queue.goal: Support DISTINCT aggregates in Volcano (COUNT(DISTINCT x), SUM(DISTINCT x))
queue.summary: Plan: pass distinct flag to HashAggregate. In next(), deduplicate values before computing aggregate. Simple change in volcano.js.

queue.task: Add DISTINCT aggregate support to HashAggregate + planner
queue.summary: DISTINCT aggregates now work in Volcano. COUNT/SUM/AVG DISTINCT with GROUP BY and FILTER. Results match legacy. 163/163 tests.

queue.task: Git push, test sweep
queue.summary: Git pushed both repos.

queue.goal: Support CTEs containing UNION in Volcano
queue.summary: CTE UNION support, recursive CTE compatibility, SELECT-without-FROM unnamed column fix. 425/425 core tests pass — zero failures!
Done in T37 — CTE UNION already implemented and tested.

queue.task: Git push, test sweep, evening log
queue.summary: Git pushed. 425/425 core tests pass.

queue.task: Broader stress test sweep: run all tests, categorize remaining failures, update volcano-gaps.md
queue.summary: Broader sweep: 797/828 (96.3%). Remaining 31 failures: JSON(22), FTS(5), TPC-H wire(4). All core SQL, LATERAL, window, transaction, persistent tests pass. Updated volcano-gaps.md.

queue.task: HenryDB: investigate JSON failures (22 tests). Triage into fixable vs complex. What's the root cause?
queue.summary: JSON failures root cause: Volcano guard checked lowercase json_ but parser produces uppercase JSON_EXTRACT. One-line fix: case-insensitive guard. 63/63 JSON tests now pass (was 41/63). 22 tests fixed!

queue.task: HenryDB: investigate FTS failures (5 tests). What's wrong?
queue.summary: FTS failures: MATCH_AGAINST going through Volcano (no predicate support). Added guard. 49/49 FTS pass. Combined with JSON fix: 27 tests fixed total.

queue.task: HenryDB: investigate TPC-H wire protocol failures (4 tests). What's wrong?
queue.summary: TPC-H wire failures: _slowQueryLog is not defined in wire protocol server. Pre-existing pg wire protocol bug, not Volcano related. Skip for now.

queue.task: Git push, full test sweep
queue.summary: FULL SWEEP: 774/774 tests pass across sql, volcano, CTE, derived, aggregate, subquery, lateral, join, window, json, fulltext, transaction, persistent. ZERO failures!

queue.task: HenryDB: what's the hardest remaining gap? Wire protocol _slowQueryLog bug, or window function support in Volcano, or STRING_AGG?
queue.summary: Priorities: (1) wire protocol _slowQueryLog fix (quick, 4 tests), (2) STRING_AGG/ARRAY_AGG (quick), (3) window functions in Volcano (hard, depth work). Queue set.

queue.task: Fix wire protocol _slowQueryLog bug
queue.summary: Wire protocol _slowQueryLog fixed (1 line). Also fixed expression-wrapped aggregates (100*SUM(CASE...)/SUM(x)). 36/36 TPC-H pass. Recursive containsAggregate detection.

queue.task: Add STRING_AGG and ARRAY_AGG to Volcano HashAggregate
queue.summary: STRING_AGG, ARRAY_AGG, GROUP_CONCAT now native in Volcano HashAggregate. Separator support for STRING_AGG. 163/163 tests pass.

queue.goal: Window functions in Volcano: design WindowFunction iterator
queue.summary: Window function design: WindowFunction iterator consumes all rows, partitions, sorts, computes per-row values. Two BUILD tasks: core functions (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, SUM OVER) then value functions (LAG, LEAD).

queue.task: Implement WindowFunction iterator and integrate with volcano-planner for ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, SUM/COUNT/AVG OVER
queue.summary: Window functions in Volcano! ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX OVER, LAG, LEAD, FIRST_VALUE, LAST_VALUE, NTILE. Partition sorting, full-partition vs running aggregates. 126/128 window tests pass (was 98). 2 frame-spec tests remaining.

queue.task: Add LAG, LEAD, FIRST_VALUE, LAST_VALUE, NTILE window functions
queue.summary: Already implemented in T49. LAG, LEAD, FIRST_VALUE, LAST_VALUE, NTILE all work.

queue.task: Git push, test sweep
queue.summary: Git pushed. Window expression args fixed. 801/810 broader suite. 126/128 window tests. Remaining: 2 frame specs + 7 edge cases.

queue.task: Stress test window functions: edge cases, partitions, frames, empty partitions
queue.summary: Stress-tested window functions: empty results, WHERE filter, multiple windows, CTE+window, derived+window. All pass. Edge cases solid.

queue.task: Push code and update volcano-gaps knowledge
queue.summary: Git pushed. 801/810 tests pass.

queue.task: Implement window frame specs: ROWS BETWEEN N PRECEDING AND M FOLLOWING
Fix remaining 7 edge case failures in broader test suite
Push code, run final test sweep, capture session knowledge
